topic: Neptune Serverless Instance Type Information

  entities:
  
    serverless instance type|Product
    Neptune Serverless|Service
    Neptune Capacity Units|Product
    DB cluster|Product
    vCPUs|Product
    provisioned instances|Product
    serverless instances|Product
  
  proposition: The serverless instance type is a Neptune Serverless feature.
    
    entity-entity relationships:
    serverless instance type|FEATURE_OF|Neptune Serverless
    
    entity-attributes:
      
  proposition: Neptune Serverless is a feature that can scale instance size dynamically based on a workload's resource needs.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|HAS_CAPABILITY|scale instance size dynamically based on workload's resource needs
    
  proposition: Neptune Serverless lets users set lower and upper limits on compute capacity for the instances in a DB cluster.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    Neptune Serverless|MANAGES|DB cluster
  
    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|HAS_CAPABILITY|lets users set lower and upper limits on compute capacity
    
  proposition: Compute capacity in Neptune Serverless is measured in Neptune Capacity Units.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    Neptune Serverless|USES|Neptune Capacity Units
  
    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Capacity Units|MEASURES|compute capacity
    
  proposition: Neptune Serverless eliminates the need to calculate how many vCPUs are needed for an application.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    Neptune Serverless|ELIMINATES_NEED_FOR|vCPUs
  
    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|HAS_BENEFIT|eliminates the need to calculate how many vCPUs are needed
    
  proposition: Workloads with varying utilization can be cost-optimized by using serverless rather than provisioned instances.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    serverless instances|COST_OPTIMIZES|provisioned instances
  
    entity-attributes:
    serverless instances|HAS_BENEFIT|cost-optimized for workloads with varying utilization
    
  proposition: Users can set up both provisioned and serverless instances in the same DB cluster.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    provisioned instances|PART_OF|DB cluster
    serverless instances|PART_OF|DB cluster
  
    entity-attributes:
    DB cluster|HAS_CAPABILITY|supports both provisioned and serverless instances
    
  proposition: Setting up both provisioned and serverless instances in the same DB cluster can achieve an optimal cost-performance configuration.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    provisioned instances|COMBINED_WITH|serverless instances
  
    entity-attributes:
    DB cluster|HAS_BENEFIT|optimal cost-performance configuration
